query:
INSERT INTO repo_map_cache (
                project_id,
                project_path,
                worktree_path,
                commit_sha,
                rendered_map,
                token_estimate,
                included_entries,
                graph_artifact
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
             ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                rendered_map=VALUES(rendered_map),
                token_estimate=VALUES(token_estimate),
                included_entries=VALUES(included_entries),
                graph_artifact=VALUES(graph_artifact)
